aeo_readiness.summary: AI models are unlikely to cite Waller Heating & Air due to limited structured data and low authority signals. The business is not optimized for AI-driven search experiences.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed business information.
Expand content to include conversational FAQs and How-To guides relevant to HVAC services.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not optimized and is currently invisible to Google AI, severely limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: Google Business Profile is not set up or claimed.
Lack of photos, posts, and Q&A to engage potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Focus on expanding citations to high-authority directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service processes

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and authority signals
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and AI-driven recommendations
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Set up and optimize Google Business Profile
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish expert-backed content and gain certifications to establish authority

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for ChatGPT and Google AI.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Waller Heating & Air is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The business is not visible on Google Business Profile and lacks essential schema markup, making it invisible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes structured data implementation, GBP optimization, and authority content creation to make Waller Heating & Air a top AI recommendation.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing market share to them.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for Waller Heating & Air
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to enhance your AI search visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business stand out to AI models and capture more leads.
